title: helianthemum origanifolium var. marifolium
intro: Helianthemum origanifolium var. marifolium, also known as rock rose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Helianthemum origanifolium var. marifolium include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce anxiety and stress, and support immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
